plugins.name: elephant-goldfish
plugins.description: Self-validating /elephant-goldfish:elephant design-doc command + Gemini goldfish judge.

plugins.name: claude-tuneup
plugins.description: Permission audit and settings tuneup — scans transcripts, classifies by scope, deduplicates global vs project settings.

plugins.name: prompt-builder
plugins.description: Iterative prompt engineering assistant — structures with Anthropic's evidence-based prompting techniques, drafts, critiques, and delivers a finished artefact with test cases.

plugins.name: imps
plugins.description: Swarm orchestrator — decomposes tasks into parallel model-routed agents, dispatches via a real Workflow script, merges through gates and persona review. Plus /imps:imp-agency: whole-repo audit → imps-ready remediation plan.

plugins.name: ape
plugins.description: Apes open-source repos for techniques transferable to your codebase — discovery, ranking, cloning, per-repo analysis, and synthesis run as a real Workflow script, so the orchestrator only sees the fingerprint and final recommendations.

plugins.name: offload-sidecar
plugins.description: MCP tool that offloads file transforms, log triage, and vision tasks so Claude passes file paths, not content — deterministic in-process where possible, else routed across local Ollama tiers (deep/fast, private) or Gemini via the agy CLI (flash/pro, budget-gated so quota exhaustion rejects up front instead of failing mid-call). Formerly ollama-sidecar.

plugins.name: recon
plugins.description: Discovery -> spec -> verify -> execution workflow for research, decisions, and reports, for Claude Cowork and Claude Code. Context isolation between phases is enforced by detection-and-refusal plus independent verification, not by asking a model to forget.
